⚙️ Settings
🎨 Theme
⚡ Dark Blue
🌸 Rose Purple
🌈 Accent Color
🌙 Display
Dark Mode
Switch between dark and light interface
🔔 Sound
UI Sounds
Subtle audio feedback for taps, completions and achievements
Sound Volume
Adjust how loud UI sounds play
Test Sounds
Preview each sound at your current volume
💾 Data Management
Progress Report
Generate a printable Weekly, Monthly or Yearly PDF report
Export Data
Download your habit data as JSON
Import Data
Restore from a previous backup
Reset All Data
Clear all habits and progress permanently
🔒 All data is stored locally in your browser. Nothing is ever sent to a server. Your privacy is fully protected.
Productive Pro
by Momentum Studio
Version 1.0 · Personal Growth OS
A premium, offline-first habit and focus companion — engineered to turn small daily actions into lasting identity change. No accounts, no tracking, no servers. Just you and your growth.
🌐 Offline First 🔒 Private ⚡ Growth OS
